<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the league/commonmark package. * * (c) Colin O'Dell <colinodell@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace League\CommonMark\Parser; use League\CommonMark\Exception\CommonMarkException; use League\CommonMark\Node\Block\Document; interface MarkdownParserInterface { /** * @throws CommonMarkException */ public function parse(string $input): Document; }
